title: Conduit Domain Manifest
description: Contract for registry/domains/<domain>.json. Domain teams declare coverage endpoints and governed memory policy. The gateway interprets this generically; compaction is owned by the external memory service.

domain_context.description: Optional short, neutral phrase describing this domain's data coverage (e.g. 'client financial data'). The gateway composes the phrases declared across all loaded domains into the classifier/synthesizer framing string. Domain-facing copy belongs here, never in gateway code (World B).

clarify_style.description: Clarification WORDING policy. 'template' (default) serves the byte-for-byte deterministic question; 'composed' lets the gateway's ClarificationComposer phrase a natural question over the grounded candidate set. The clarify DECISION stays deterministic regardless — this only affects wording, and the deterministic template is always the validated fallback.

clarify_tone.description: Optional tone/style hint passed to the ClarificationComposer when clarify_style is 'composed' (e.g. 'warm and professional'). Ignored for 'template'.

discover_url.description: Template URL for DISCOVER. Must include {principal_id} when used by a resource-scoped sub-domain.

check_url.description: Template URL for CHECK. Must include {principal_id} and {id} when used by a resource-scoped sub-domain.

must_preserve.description: Manifest-declared fact keys or labels the memory service must preserve.

can_drop.description: Payload fields safe to omit from governed summaries.

owner.description: Compaction ownership must remain outside the gateway.
